name: @roderai/sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for the Roder app-server JSON-RPC API

scripts.prepack: pnpm run codegen:check && pnpm run verify:readme && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm test -- fixtures
scripts.verify:readme: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const text = fs.readFileSync('README.md', 'utf8'); if (!text.includes('RoderAgent') || !text.includes('pnpm run typecheck')) process.exit(1);"
